title: cyphomandra subhastata
intro: Cyphomandra subhastata, also known as the 'Tree Tomato' or 'Tamarillo', is a type of plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family and is native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyphomandra subhastata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Cyphomandra subhastata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
